# Berk Babadoğan

Berk Babadoğan is a professional Software Engineer and Computer Engineer specializing in cross-platform application development, software architecture, and developer tooling.

## Key Information
- **Title**: Software Engineer / Computer Engineer
- **Company**: Babadogan Tech and Edu (Ankara University Technopolis)
- **Location**: Ankara, Turkey
- **Education**: Master's in Computer Engineering (Hacettepe University), Bachelor's in Computer Engineering (Çankaya University)
- **Languages**: Turkish (Native), English (Fluent), Romanian (B1 Certified)
- **Certificates**: ILR B1 Certificate in Romanian Language (February 2026)

## Contact & Links
- **GitHub**: [github.com/berkbb](https://github.com/berkbb)
- **LinkedIn**: [linkedin.com/in/berkbabadogan](https://www.linkedin.com/in/berkbabadogan/)
- **Personal Site**: [berk.babadogan.net](https://berk.babadogan.net)
- **ORCID**: 0000-0002-8840-3992
- **EU F&T Expert ID**: EX2023D833118

## Technical Stack
- **Languages**: C#, Dart, Swift, Java, HTML/CSS/JS
- **Frameworks & Platforms**: WinUI, .NET MAUI, Flutter, iOS, macOS, iPadOS, Android, Microsoft .NET
- **Cloud/Databases**: Azure, Firebase

## Featured Projects & Repositories
- **aptreceipt**: Swift application to generate apartment income/expense receipts as images.
- **dart_encrypter** & **encrypter_net**: Encryption/decryption libraries in Dart/Flutter and .NET.
- **logbox_color**: Colored terminal log formatter package for Verbose, Info, Debug, Warning, and Error logs.
- **tcid_checker** & **tcid_checker_net**: Turkish National Identity Number verification libraries for Dart/Flutter and .NET.
- **isbn_searcher** & **isbn_searcher_net**: Google API-based ISBN metadata search tools.
- **colorlogger_net**: Color logger class for .NET.
- **devmatebb** & **devorabb**: Custom-designed VS Code themes.
